additional_attention_groups.explanation: Broker connection has not been proven because no live runtime is currently bound.

additional_attention_groups.operator_next_step: Inspect the submit guard evidence before attempting another order.

additional_attention_groups.headline: AccountOwner not proven accepting
additional_attention_groups.operator_next_step: Wait for AccountOwner accepting/generation proof before expecting submit readiness to clear.

additional_attention_groups.explanation: Reconciliation state is NOT_AVAILABLE; runtime reconciliation cannot run until a bot process is bound.
additional_attention_groups.headline: Runtime reconciliation is waiting for a live bot process
additional_attention_groups.operator_next_step: Manually verify IBKR first; then start/redeploy the bot so runtime reconciliation can produce a receipt.

additional_attention_groups.explanation: No cached Account Truth projection is available for this account.

additional_attention_groups.explanation: Host process is IDLE; live-only commands cannot execute until a bot process is started.

additional_attention_groups.headline: Trading session not accepting strategy activity
additional_attention_groups.operator_next_step: Wait for the strategy session window before expecting submit readiness to clear.
